title: Chapter 3
text: AUTHOR NOTE Hello reader friend, If you haven’t read my books before, you might not know this, but I write darker stories that can be upsetting and disturbing. My books and main characters aren't for the faint of heart. This book contains primal kink, dubcon and mentions of sexual assault. I trust you know your triggers before you proceed. God of Wrath is a complete STANDALONE. For more things Rina Kent, visit www.rinakent.com
